meta.primaryBenefit: resolve tickets faster and serve customers better

openingCard.title: Customer support teams waste hours tracking tickets across disconnected tools
openingCard.subtitle: TicketFlow unifies your entire support operation

scenes.title: Admin Control Center
scenes.salesHook: Centralized dashboard for real-time ticket and system monitoring
scenes.narration: The Admin Control Center provides a unified overview of ticket queues, backlog, total and active tickets, and key AI performance indicators. Instantly assess system health, utilization, and average resolution time to proactively manage support operations and ensure peak performance.
scenes.description: The Admin Control Center provides a unified overview of ticket queues, backlog, total and active tickets, and key AI performance indicators. Instantly assess system health, utilization, and average resolution time to proactively manage support operations and ensure peak performance.

scenes.title: Customer Management
scenes.salesHook: Easily manage and access customer profiles in seconds
scenes.narration: This feature enables you to quickly view and select individual customers from a centralized list. See contact details at a glance to streamline support and registration handling for both new and existing users, ensuring efficient customer management.
scenes.description: This feature enables you to quickly view and select individual customers from a centralized list. See contact details at a glance to streamline support and registration handling for both new and existing users, ensuring efficient customer management.

scenes.title: User Management
scenes.salesHook: Easily control user roles and account access in seconds
scenes.narration: Quickly view, edit, or deactivate user accounts with clear role and status indicators. Streamline team onboarding and security by assigning specific permissions, ensuring only authorized users access critical system features.
scenes.description: Quickly view, edit, or deactivate user accounts with clear role and status indicators. Streamline team onboarding and security by assigning specific permissions, ensuring only authorized users access critical system features.

scenes.title: SLA Configuration
scenes.salesHook: Set custom response and resolution times by priority level
scenes.narration: Quickly configure and manage SLA policies for different ticket priorities, ensuring timely support and clear expectations. This feature empowers teams to automate response and resolution targets, improving customer satisfaction and operational efficiency.
scenes.description: Quickly configure and manage SLA policies for different ticket priorities, ensuring timely support and clear expectations. This feature empowers teams to automate response and resolution targets, improving customer satisfaction and operational efficiency.

scenes.title: Analytics Intelligence Dashboard
scenes.salesHook: Gain real-time insights into ticket flow and team performance
scenes.narration: This dashboard centralizes ticket metrics, including open tickets, resolved cases, and average resolution time. Visual summaries and breakdowns by creation source empower managers to monitor team efficiency and optimize support operations instantly.
scenes.description: This dashboard centralizes ticket metrics, including open tickets, resolved cases, and average resolution time. Visual summaries and breakdowns by creation source empower managers to monitor team efficiency and optimize support operations instantly.

scenes.title: Support Dashboard Overview
scenes.salesHook: Monitor ticket flow, SLAs, and alerts in real time
scenes.narration: This dashboard gives support teams a centralized overview of all ticket activity, SLA compliance, and active alerts. Instantly see ticket counts, agent status, and urgent software alerts to prioritize responses and maintain service quality.
scenes.description: This dashboard gives support teams a centralized overview of all ticket activity, SLA compliance, and active alerts. Instantly see ticket counts, agent status, and urgent software alerts to prioritize responses and maintain service quality.

scenes.title: Ticket Management
scenes.salesHook: Efficiently monitor and prioritize support tickets in one view
scenes.narration: Quickly view, sort, and manage all customer support tickets with real-time updates on status, priority, and assignment. This centralized dashboard enables teams to streamline ticket tracking, ensuring timely resolutions and improved customer satisfaction.
scenes.description: Quickly view, sort, and manage all customer support tickets with real-time updates on status, priority, and assignment. This centralized dashboard enables teams to streamline ticket tracking, ensuring timely resolutions and improved customer satisfaction.

scenes.title: Escalated Tickets View
scenes.salesHook: Quickly monitor high-priority support tickets for faster resolution
scenes.narration: This feature provides a centralized table of escalated support tickets, displaying key details like priority, product, assigned agent, and SLA deadlines. Managers can instantly spot critical issues and ensure timely follow-up to improve customer satisfaction.
scenes.description: This feature provides a centralized table of escalated support tickets, displaying key details like priority, product, assigned agent, and SLA deadlines. Managers can instantly spot critical issues and ensure timely follow-up to improve customer satisfaction.

scenes.title: Unified Issue Dashboard
scenes.salesHook: Gain instant visibility of all support tickets in one place
scenes.narration: This dashboard provides a consolidated overview of all open, in-progress, and resolved issues, letting support teams quickly assess workload and priorities. Key metrics and status filters streamline issue tracking, boosting team efficiency and response times.
scenes.description: This dashboard provides a consolidated overview of all open, in-progress, and resolved issues, letting support teams quickly assess workload and priorities. Key metrics and status filters streamline issue tracking, boosting team efficiency and response times.

scenes.title: Issue Type Selection
scenes.salesHook: Quickly categorize support tickets for faster resolutions
scenes.narration: Support agents can efficiently choose between hardware and software issue types when creating a ticket. This clear categorization streamlines the ticket routing process, ensuring customers are connected with the right expertise more quickly.
scenes.description: Support agents can efficiently choose between hardware and software issue types when creating a ticket. This clear categorization streamlines the ticket routing process, ensuring customers are connected with the right expertise more quickly.

scenes.title: Ticket Overview Dashboard
scenes.salesHook: Instantly track ticket status and priorities at a glance
scenes.narration: The dashboard provides a clear summary of all tickets, highlighting totals, open, in progress, and resolved cases. This visibility enables support teams to quickly identify workload and respond effectively, maximizing operational efficiency.
scenes.description: The dashboard provides a clear summary of all tickets, highlighting totals, open, in progress, and resolved cases. This visibility enables support teams to quickly identify workload and respond effectively, maximizing operational efficiency.

scenes.title: Issue Type Selection
scenes.salesHook: Quickly categorize support tickets for faster resolution
scenes.narration: Users can easily specify whether their problem is hardware or software related, streamlining the ticket creation process. This ensures IT teams receive the right context and can prioritize or assign issues more efficiently.
scenes.description: Users can easily specify whether their problem is hardware or software related, streamlining the ticket creation process. This ensures IT teams receive the right context and can prioritize or assign issues more efficiently.

scenes.title: My Products Dashboard
scenes.salesHook: Easily manage all software licenses in one place
scenes.narration: The My Products dashboard centralizes tracking for all your registered hardware and software licenses, showing key details like serial numbers and expiry dates. Instantly renew licenses with a single click, minimizing downtime and ensuring continuous operations across devices.
scenes.description: The My Products dashboard centralizes tracking for all your registered hardware and software licenses, showing key details like serial numbers and expiry dates. Instantly renew licenses with a single click, minimizing downtime and ensuring continuous operations across devices.

scenes.title: Issue Type Selection
scenes.salesHook: Streamline support by categorizing hardware and software issues instantly
scenes.narration: Users can easily specify whether their problem is hardware or software related, allowing IT teams to quickly direct the ticket to the appropriate expert. This reduces response times and ensures more efficient resolution of support requests.
scenes.description: Users can easily specify whether their problem is hardware or software related, allowing IT teams to quickly direct the ticket to the appropriate expert. This reduces response times and ensures more efficient resolution of support requests.

Every minute of delay costs customer trust.
Manual triage is slow, inconsistent, and error-prone.

bullets.label: Multi-Role Access
bullets.description: Manage IT Admin, Support, and Customer access from one unified platform.

bullets.label: Real-Time Ticket Tracking
bullets.description: Monitor every open, escalated, and resolved ticket across your team in real-time.

bullets.label: SLA Policy Management
bullets.description: Define response and resolution targets by priority to consistently meet your service commitments.

bullets.label: Jira Integration
bullets.description: Sync tickets with Jira Hub for seamless development-to-support collaboration.

bullets.label: Analytics Intelligence
bullets.description: Get instant insights on ticket volume, resolution times, and team performance.
